posts.author: Meganotto (Megan O | Monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

It would be helpful to be able to mute at an admin level or user level managed template notifications.

What are you trying to achieve

I have to have several people invited to my template in order to have automations set up correctly and reduce manual work when instances are created however when I make minor changes and don’t put a description, as well as have the board muted for everyone. All subscribers still receive a notification and we have boards with 50+ instances so they get a notification for every single one.
